game.title.description: Name of the Sudoku puzzle game.
game.title.notes: Sudoku is a loan-word in most locales — prefer the commonly-used form.

game.description.description: One-line description on the Sudoku game card.
game.description.notes: Short pitch: 9x9 number puzzle with easy/medium/hard difficulty.

game.playLabel.description: Accessibility label for the Sudoku play button.

cell.label.description: Screen-reader label for a grid cell, e.g. 'Cell row 3, column 5, empty' or 'Cell row 3, column 5, 7'.
cell.label.notes: `{{value}}` is either a digit 1-9 or the translated 'empty' string from cell.empty.

cell.empty.description: Text substituted into cell.label when a cell has no placed value.

numberPad.digit.description: Accessibility label for a digit button on the number pad.

numberPad.toggleNotes.description: Accessibility label for the pencil-marks toggle button.
numberPad.toggleNotes.notes: Applied to both the header toggle and the NumberPad button.

numberPad.notes.description: Short visible label for the pencil-marks toggle button ('Notes').

numberPad.erase.description: Accessibility label for the erase-cell button.

numberPad.eraseShort.description: Short visible label for the erase-cell button ('Erase').

difficulty.groupLabel.description: Accessibility group label for the difficulty radio buttons.

difficulty.easy.description: Label for the 'Easy' difficulty tier (36-44 given cells).

difficulty.medium.description: Label for the 'Medium' difficulty tier (28-35 given cells).

difficulty.hard.description: Label for the 'Hard' difficulty tier (22-27 given cells).

action.undo.description: Label + accessibility label for the Undo button.

action.newGame.description: Label for the 'New Puzzle' button (starts a fresh puzzle at the same difficulty).

action.changeDifficulty.description: Label for the 'Change Difficulty' button (returns to the difficulty picker).

action.start.description: Primary CTA to start the chosen puzzle.

action.submitScore.description: Primary CTA to submit the score to the leaderboard.

preGame.title.description: Headline inviting the player to pick a difficulty.

hud.errors.notes: Use the locale's plural form.  The engine picks `hud.errorsOne` for exactly one error.

hud.errorsOne.description: Error counter for exactly one error (singular).

hud.elapsed.description: Accessibility label for the elapsed-time display.
hud.elapsed.notes: `{{time}}` is a formatted duration like 02:13 or 1:04:27.

win.title.description: Congratulatory headline shown when the puzzle is solved.

win.score.description: Final score line in the win modal.

win.errors.description: Total errors line in the win modal.

win.elapsed.description: Elapsed-time line in the win modal.
